ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) - a unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was produced */,
  "engine_displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement of the vehicle in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission used in the vehicle */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain used in the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., Special Purpose Vehicle 2WD, Midsize Cars) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle (e.g., Regular, Premium) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was produced */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the vehicle data (e.g., manual entry, automated sensors) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the vehicle data to track changes over time */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the make */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the make is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the make was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status of the model (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record belongs to */,
  "fuel_barrels_year" REAL /* Fuel consumption in barrels per year */,
  "city_mpg" INTEGER /* City miles per gallon */,
  "highway_mpg" INTEGER /* Highway miles per gallon */,
  "combined_mpg" INTEGER /* Combined miles per gallon */,
  "co2_emission_grams_mile" REAL /* CO2 emissions in grams per mile */,
  "fuel_cost_year" INTEGER /* Fuel cost in dollars per year */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the fuel efficiency test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the fuel efficiency test was conducted */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the test was conducted (e.g., urban, highway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., user manual, technical specifications) */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the document was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access request (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
